175.HK.wrongIf_at_capture_e: [NEEDS_JUNYAN_REVIEW] revenue_growth < -10% for 2 consecutive quarters OR operating_margin < 3% (auto-industry stress proxy) OR EV market-share loss to BYD by >300bp QoQ
